LAW AND MOTION 302, DEC-06-2024 RE: MOTION TO DISMISS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 583.360 FOR FAILURE TO BRING CASE TO TRIAL. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON'S MOTION TO DISMISS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 583.360 FOR FAILURE TO BRING CASE TO TRIAL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And To Dismiss This Action Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 583.360 For Failure To Bring Case To Trial; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to open court, Plainiff's counsel Mr. Kennard informs the clerk opposing counsel is not appearing since the settlement is confirmed.

Appearances (by Zoom):
Robert Kennard, Esq. 916-920-2295 Nelson & Kennard for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

The matter is uncontested/discussed. Mr. Kennard informs the Court there is a resolution and a joint dismissal has been lodged for cases CGC-18-564211 and CGC-19-575785. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And To Dismiss This Action Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 583.360 For Failure To Bring Case To Trial; Request For Sanctions.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling and the matter is off-calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 583.360 For Failure To Bring Case To Trial
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON'S Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 583.360 For Failure To Bring Case To Trial.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Robert Scott Kennard, Esq., of Nelson & Kennard, (916) 920-2295, for Plaintiff.
Timothy P. Rumberger, Esq., Law Office of, (510) 841-5500, for Defendant.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Michael Lipson's Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 583.360 For Failure To Bring Case To Trial is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Defendant is in default. (See 9/10/2024 Order.) Before bringing any motion (or generally otherwise being heard) in this matter, Defendant must seek and secure relief from default.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:50 am pausing at 9:53 am, resuming at 10:32 am and concluding at 10:39 am.

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A. is represented by Gloria Zarco, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Michael Lipson is represented by Timothy Rumberger, Esq.
JULIE MARQUETTE is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Court passes the matter at 9:53 am to allow counsel to meet and confer.

The Court recalls the matter at 10:32 am, Plaintiff requests the Court take the matter off calendar to allow parties to enter into a joint stipulation.

The Court Grants Plaintiffs request, and the matter is taken off calendar. (D505)
